creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
The encoding conversion works ok on 10.0-BETA4 with the latest
mail/mutt and editors/vim port.

uname -a:

FreeBSD minimax.priv.k2r.org 10.0-BETA4 FreeBSD 10.0-BETA4 #19
r258903: Wed Dec  4 12:28:44 JST 2013
root@minimax.priv.k2r.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/K2RKERNEL  amd64

I later found that my vimrc setting failed Japanese auto-conversion
process of encoding. I concluded this is NOT a matter of GNU/Citrus
iconv difference any more. I think this issue can be closed. Thanks
for the bugfix on the base libiconv.

Kenji Rikitake
